name: Catalyze
text1: Draw 1 card from any splice deck. Then, roll 1 die: 1 or 10: Put the Fracture into play; if the Fracture is already in play, destroy each unit in Styx's system and place neutral units as indicated on the back of its tile. If Styx was owned by a player, they return its planet card to the planet card deck.

name: Endorse
text1: Place any player's control token on this card. That player does not have to spend a command token to resolve the secondary ability of any strategy card. Discard this card at the end of the status phase.

name: Enfilade
text1: Place 1 structure on a planet you control, or destroy 1 structure in a non-home system. Then, all players may place 1 PDS on a planet they control.

name: Sanctuary
text1: Choose 1 system other than the Mecatol Rex system that contains a planet you control; each other player places a command token from their reinforcements in the chosen system.

name: Spoil
text1: Each other player removes 1 of their non-fighter ships from the game board. Gain trade goods equal to the combined cost of those ships.
